title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.907 - Minority-owned construction companies not required, when
text:
226.907.  Minority-owned construction companies not required, when. — 1.  The provisions of sections 226.900 and 226.905 shall not apply to any contracts necessitated by damage inflicted in the flood of 1993.
  2.  If the report required by section 226.900 certifies that the ten percent goal has been achieved, the provisions of section 226.905 and this section dealing with minority-owned construction companies shall become null and void.
(L. 1993 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 2 § 3) 
Effective 9-30-93
